_comment: Recorded from a real run on 2026-04-22. Model: claude-sonnet-4-6. Doc: first 25k chars of CURRICULUM_SPEC.md (~7820 tokens). Token counts and latencies come straight from response.usage and time.perf_counter. Regenerate with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set.

no_cache.question: What is the prerequisite for the FlashAttention2 Triton notebook?
no_cache.text: It requires an Ampere-class or newer GPU; the notebook header lists this hardware constraint explicitly.

no_cache.question: Which track has the most notebooks in v0.1?
no_cache.text: Track 05_serving and track 01_inference each ship 10 notebooks; the serving track has 11 once 01_roofline_analysis is included.

no_cache.question: Name the three KV cache compression methods covered in track 05.
Which evaluation notebook teaches Bradley-Terry?
no_cache.text: 06_eval/05_arena_elo_bradley_terry covers Elo with the Bradley-Terry model.
